# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write an Istio configuration that enables Envoy admin interface on all sidecars. Set proxyAdminPort to 15000 and make it accessible for debugging. Expose admin endpoints like /config_dump, /stats, and /clusters on all pods. This is for troubleshooting service mesh issues in production.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: install.istio.io/v1alpha1
kind: IstioOperator
metadata:
  name: istio-admin-interface
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  meshConfig:
    defaultConfig:
      proxyAdminPort: 15000
      statusPort: 15021
      proxyMetadata:
        ISTIO_META_ENABLE_ADMIN_ENDPOINTS: "true"
  values:
    global:
      proxy:
        statusPort: 15021
        adminPort: 15000
    sidecarInjectorWebhook:
      rewriteAppHTTPProbe: true
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: EnvoyFilter
metadata:
  name: enable-envoy-admin
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  configPatches:
  - applyTo: BOOTSTRAP
    patch:
      operation: MERGE
      value:
        admin:
          access_log_path: /dev/null
          address:
            socket_address:
              address: 0.0.0.0
              port_value: 15000
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: envoy-admin
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: envoy-admin
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
  - port: 15000
    targetPort: 15000
    protocol: TCP
    name: admin
  selector:
    security.istio.io/tlsMode: istio
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-envoy-admin
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
  - to:
    - operation:
        ports: ["15000"]
        paths:
        - /config_dump
        - /stats
        - /stats/*
        - /clusters
        - /clusters/*
        - /listeners
        - /listeners/*
        - /server_info
        - /ready
        - /runtime
        - /certs
        - /memory
        - /contention
        - /cpuprofiler
        - /heapprofiler
        - /logging
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: default-sidecar-admin
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  egress:
  - hosts:
    - "*/*"
  ingress:
  - port:
      number: 15000
      protocol: HTTP
      name: envoy-admin
    defaultEndpoint: 127.0.0.1:15000
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: istio-sidecar-injector
  namespace: istio-system
data:
  values: |
    {
      "global": {
        "proxy": {
          "adminPort": 15000,
          "statusPort": 15021,
          "readinessInitialDelaySeconds": 1,
          "readinessPeriodSeconds": 2,
          "readinessFailureThreshold": 30
        }
      }
    }
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: debug-envoy-admin
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: debug-envoy-admin
spec:
  type: NodePort
  ports:
  - port: 15000
    targetPort: 15000
    protocol: TCP
    name: admin
  selector:
    debug-admin: enabled
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-envoy-admin-access
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      security.istio.io/tlsMode: istio
  policyTypes:
  - Ingress
  ingress:
  - from:
    - namespaceSelector: {}
    ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 15000
